title: rosa × odorata f. ochroleuca
intro: Rosa × odorata f. ochroleuca, commonly known as the white tea rose or yellow rose, is a fragrant and flowering plant that belongs to the family Rosaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can aid in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rosa × odorata f. ochroleuca include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and support overall well-being.
